allow: Bash(python -m pip install pandas openpyxl fastapi uvicorn python-multipart anthropic python-dotenv -q)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep 10; try { Invoke-RestMethod http://localhost:8000/health } catch { "Server not ready yet: $_" })
PowerShell(\(Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:8000/dashboard -UseBasicParsing\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object vendor_count, total_spend)
